metadata.title: Build a governed research agent prompt for finance operations in Latin America, using the memory lens to surface compliance-relevant patterns, policy gaps, and claim-limit exposures from fragmented enterprise data.

mission.primary_objective: Build a governed research agent prompt for finance operations in Latin America, using the memory lens to surface compliance-relevant patterns, policy gaps, and claim-limit exposures from fragmented enterprise data.
mission.success_definition: Agent produces a research artifact with at least three validated compliance patterns from the overbroad input.; Claim-limit exposures are identified and mapped to specific policy sources.; All validation gates are documented in the output with pass/fail status.; Ambiguous acceptance criteria are flagged with recommended clarification steps.; Output is SR8-compilable into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

in_scope.item: The agent must ingest overbroad one-pass lock inputs (messy, missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) and produce a structured research output with explicit validation gates. Focus on source policy and claim limits across LATAM finance ops.

conflict_resolution.rule: SR8 canonical artifact fields override renderer defaults.
SRXML validation failures force blocked receipt state.

execution_contract.pipeline: raw_intent -> SR8 classification -> canonical artifact -> SRXML draft -> SRXML validation -> receipt

hard_constraints.item: Do not claim final sealed state from RC2 transform output.
Return blocked-state receipt when SR8 readiness is fail or intake is incomplete.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 1
gate.pass_condition: Agent produces a research artifact with at least three validated compliance patterns from the overbroad input.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 2
gate.pass_condition: Claim-limit exposures are identified and mapped to specific policy sources.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 3
gate.pass_condition: All validation gates are documented in the output with pass/fail status.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 4
gate.pass_condition: Ambiguous acceptance criteria are flagged with recommended clarification steps.

gate.name: SR8 acceptance gate 5
gate.pass_condition: Output is SR8-compilable into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

output_contract.completion_definition: Artifact parses as XML and passes SRXML RC2 static validation.

SRXML_Artifact.research_question: Build a governed research agent prompt for finance operations in Latin America, using the memory lens to surface compliance-relevant patterns, policy gaps, and claim-limit exposures from fragmented enterprise data.
SRXML_Artifact.search_strategy: The agent must ingest overbroad one-pass lock inputs (messy, missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria) and produce a structured research output with explicit validation gates. Focus on source policy and claim limits across LATAM finance ops.
SRXML_Artifact.evidence_standard: Record evidence limits and cite available sources.
SRXML_Artifact.citation_rules: Cite every external claim when external research is used.
SRXML_Artifact.final_report_contract: format: JSON; sections: research_summary; compliance_patterns; claim_limit_analysis; validation_gates_log; ambiguity_flags; recommended_actions; validation_required: True; compilable_to_sr8: True

validation.minimum_pass_standard: SR8 canonical validation must be recorded and SRXML static validation must pass.

known_failure_modes.item: SR8 artifact classification cannot be represented by SRXML RC2.
SRXML static validation fails after rendering.

failure_handling.fallback_behavior: Return a blocked-state receipt and repair prompt instead of claiming executable success.
failure_handling.blocked_state: No blocked state recorded by SR8 at render time.

receipt.must_record: changed files, commands run, validation result, lineage
